headline: ₹100-500 Cr (routine capex, not at risk) — JSW Energy commissions India's largest green hydrogen plant, strengthening green energy leadership
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, TCFD, GRI, EU Taxonomy frameworks; supports compliance, no penalty risk.
No immediate P/E effect; long-term potential for premium if green hydrogen scales.
May unlock lower cost of capital and access to green bonds; no immediate bond spread impact.
